title: Saabs vinst slår estimat: "Investeringar i kapacitet"
summary_md:
# Saabs vinst slår estimat: "Investeringar i kapacitet"

**Feed**: dagen-med-di  
**Published**: 2026-04-23  
**Market Sentiment**: Positive

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

The episode is an earnings interview with Saab's CEO Mikael Johansson following a Q1 report that beat estimates: operating profit of SEK 1.9bn, operating cash flow up to SEK 1bn, order intake at SEK 19bn, and a margin of 10%, with organic growth of 23.6% driven by capacity investments coming online. The CEO reaffirmed growth targets but flagged supply-chain risks tied to geopolitics, Asian raw materials, semiconductor/memory demand, and China's restrictions on rare-earth metals. Overall tone is upbeat on performance with measured caution on future supply security.

---

## Universe Stocks

### 🟢 SAAB-B — Saab | **BUY** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 60%

Q1 beat: operating profit SEK 1.9bn above expectations, 10% margin, 23.6% organic growth from capacity investments coming online; growth targets reaffirmed.

#### Reasoning

Saab delivered an earnings beat with strong organic growth (23.6%) and improving operating profit as capacity investments enter service. Margin of 10% exceeded analyst forecasts and order intake (SEK 19bn) was in line with a strong order backlog. The CEO reaffirmed growth targets. The main risk is supply-chain dependence on Asian raw materials and Chinese rare-earth metals, though buffers/inventory cover years out, mitigating near-term impact.

#### Sell Triggers

- if China rare-earth export restrictions cause material supply disruption
- if delivery-chain bottlenecks materially slow production
- if organic growth or margin reverses in coming quarters

> *"Det är naturligtvis att vi får våra investeringar i kapacitet att komma i drift. Därmed fortsätter vi att växa kraftigt med organisk tillväxt på 23,6%."*
